items: LCAP Adoption for 2025-2026 — $133.7M total plan with 8 goals and 59 actions/services. Final adoption after June 18 public hearing.
Budget Adoption for 2025-2026 — $148.7M revenue, $151.5M expenditures = deficit spending. Board acknowledged structural gap to be addressed via parcel tax and budget reductions.
HVAC Phase II Approval — $21.25M for Kennedy Middle School, Orion Elementary, and Clifford Elementary. Applied Materials Engineering commissioning + Cypress Engineering inspection services.
Dashboard Local Indicator Measurements — self-assessment on local indicators (school climate, parent engagement, access to standards, etc.)
Newsela Digital Content — contract renewal for K-8 nonfiction content library
Boys & Girls Clubs of the Peninsula — $2,000,000 afterschool services (Expanded Learning)
Sequoia Healthcare District — $937,000 for school health services partnership
Catalyst Family Inc. — $838,599 afterschool services at North Star Academy
Resolution No. 26 — year-end budget transfers and adjustments
Resolution No. 27 — authorization for interim period budget actions (July 1 through budget adoption)
RCAA/RCTA/CSEA Labor Agreements — ratification of all three union contracts totaling $3.24M combined impact (same agreements from June 11)

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Items 10.6 (Approval of Local Interagency Agreement to Provide Education and Training to Credential Candidates) and 10.7 (Approval of Personnel Report) were moved from Action Items to Consent Agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I will make a motion to approve all the consent items.

items.intro_words: Call to Order President Wells called the Regular Meeting to order at 7:00
Roll Call Present at the Regular Board meeting: President Mike Wells;
Changes to the Agenda President Wells requested that Action Items 10.6,
Approval of the Agenda The School Board approved the agenda as amended
Approval of Bond Program Consent Items The School Board approved the Bond
Bond Program Action Items 7.1 Recommendation re: Approval of HVAC Upgrade
Discussion Items 8.1 Discussion on Local Indicator Measurement for the California
Approval of Consent Items The School Board approved the Consent Items
Action Items 10.1 Recommendation re: Approval of the Local Control and Accountability
10.2 Recommendation re: Approval of the 2025-2026 Proposed Budget for Redwood
10.3 Recommendation re: Adoption of Resolution No. 26, The Education Protection
10.4 Recommendation re: Adoption of Resolution No. 27, Approval of Education
10.5 is the 2526 consolidated application for federal funding programs.
